subcodes.title: Tablet of visitation for Aqa Rida
subcodes.first_line: Glory, praise, radiance, and peace be upon thee, O flame of the love of God and light of the Kingdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: البهاء و الثناء و الضیاء و الصلوه و السلام علیک یا نار محبه الله و نور ملکوت
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @eulogies; reminiscences, @visitation Tablets, @Shrines and Holy places, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @service to others; to the Cause of God
